manifest_title: SeptiVolt Solar Sales Rep Accelerator — Transcript Production Manifest
notes: Slide counts reflect audio segments per module. Estimated narration time at ~90 words/slide, ~60 seconds/slide average. V2 additive modules are marked with v2:true and have transcripts ready in ElevenLabs_Transcripts_V2_Modules.md.

modules.title: Day 1 Welcome & Orientation
modules.lesson_objective: Orient new reps, set expectations, introduce the 7-day journey

modules.title: Administrative Onboarding
modules.lesson_objective: Complete all paperwork efficiently, set up systems and tools, remove day-one confusion

modules.title: Company Culture & Expectations
modules.lesson_objective: Clarify behavioral standards, set performance benchmarks, explain support systems

modules.title: Solar Industry Overview
modules.lesson_objective: Understand the solar market landscape, know the competition, grasp the urgency (why now?)

modules.title: Solar Technology Fundamentals
modules.lesson_objective: Speak with technical authority, answer homeowner questions confidently, avoid sounding like a typical salesperson

modules.title: Understanding Utility Bills & Net Metering
modules.lesson_objective: Master the mechanics of utility billing and NEM in simple, homeowner-friendly language

modules.title: Solar Financial Structures
modules.lesson_objective: Understand cash, loans, leases, and PPAs — match the right structure to each homeowner

modules.title: Identity Shift: Consultant vs. Salesperson
modules.lesson_objective: Reframe the role, build integrity-first mindset, prevent burnout from rejection

modules.title: Utility Bill Mastery: Introduction
modules.lesson_objective: Read and interpret a utility bill, identify qualified homeowners instantly, understand offset percentages

modules.title: Basic Site Engineering Awareness
modules.lesson_objective: See more, promise less, close better — spot site deal-killers before the formal survey

modules.title: Day 1 Wrap-Up & Preview
modules.lesson_objective: Consolidate Day 1 learning, assign field homework, preview Day 2

modules.title: Homeowner Psychology: Why People Resist Solar
modules.lesson_objective: Understand psychological barriers homeowners bring, recognize resistance as normal, shift from pushing to guiding

modules.title: Territory Strategy & Planning
modules.lesson_objective: Choose high-probability neighborhoods, leverage install proximity, build neighborhood authority

modules.title: Daily Efficiency Math & Time Management
modules.lesson_objective: Understand revenue per hour, maximize golden hours, eliminate time waste

modules.title: The Solar Conversation Framework: Introduction
modules.lesson_objective: Introduce the full conversation arc from door to close, set framework expectations

modules.title: Door Knocking Mastery
modules.lesson_objective: Overcome door anxiety, master the 30-second pitch, set appointments efficiently

modules.title: Micro Objection Handling: Getting Past the Brush-Off
modules.lesson_objective: Handle doorstep brush-offs, not interested, already have solar, too busy

modules.title: Phone & Virtual Appointment Setting
modules.lesson_objective: Convert inbound leads to appointments, handle cold calls professionally, master tonality and pacing

modules.title: Anti-Sales Framing & Trust Building
modules.lesson_objective: Position as consultant not salesperson, use disarming language, build instant rapport

modules.title: In-Home Positioning & Environmental Control
modules.lesson_objective: Control the appointment setting, build subconscious authority, eliminate distractions

modules.title: Personality Profiling (BOLT Framework)
modules.lesson_objective: Identify personality type in 2 minutes, adapt communication style, avoid mismatches that kill deals

modules.title: Tactical Empathy & Mirroring
modules.lesson_objective: Build deep rapport instantly, make homeowners feel heard, uncover hidden objections

modules.title: Question Architecture: The Discovery Sequence
modules.lesson_objective: Uncover true pain points, build urgency, qualify financial readiness using the 12-question framework

modules.title: Spouse & Decision-Maker Dynamics
modules.lesson_objective: Prevent the absent decision-maker problem, include all stakeholders, neutralize the stall

modules.title: Roof & Site Assessment
modules.lesson_objective: Spot deal-killers early, set realistic expectations, avoid costly site surveys for unqualified homes

modules.title: Technical Discovery Questions
modules.lesson_objective: Uncover hidden technical deal-killers through deep discovery before committing to design

modules.title: Site Survey Prep for Reps
modules.lesson_objective: Close the gap between sales and installation — set expectations and coordinate handoffs
modules.transcript_section: Module 3.7B – Site Survey Prep for Reps

modules.title: Disqualification Mastery: When to Walk Away
modules.lesson_objective: Protect time and company resources, build trust by being honest, avoid future cancellations

modules.title: Utility Bill Deep Dive: Advanced Analysis
modules.lesson_objective: Perform surgical bill analysis in front of homeowner, build credibility through technical mastery, identify hidden savings

modules.title: Presentation Structure & Flow
modules.lesson_objective: The anatomy of a winning solar presentation — sequencing, pacing, and visual anchoring

modules.title: Financing Deep Dive
modules.lesson_objective: Explain loan vs lease vs PPA clearly, match financing to homeowner goals, calculate payments with confidence

modules.title: Technical Specs for Non-Techies
modules.lesson_objective: How to explain high-tech solar in low-tech language — panel efficiency, inverters, and production math

modules.title: Equipment Competitive Comparison
modules.lesson_objective: How to win against the other guy without being negative — ethical competitive positioning

modules.title: The Value Stack: Beyond Money
modules.lesson_objective: Expand the value conversation beyond cost savings — energy independence, home value, legacy

modules.title: Net Metering & Battery Storage
modules.lesson_objective: Explain net metering and battery backup clearly, position storage as an upgrade, address grid outage concerns

modules.title: NEM 3.0 & Battery Sales Logic
modules.lesson_objective: Understand NEM 3.0 rate structure changes and use them to position battery storage as the logical next step

modules.title: System Design & Production Estimates
modules.lesson_objective: Walk homeowners through a system design, explain production estimates, set realistic expectations

modules.title: The Full Presentation Flow
modules.lesson_objective: Execute a complete, end-to-end presentation from opener to proposal reveal

modules.title: Day 4 Wrap-Up & Homework
modules.lesson_objective: Consolidate Day 4 skills, assign presentation drill homework, preview Day 5

modules.title: Objection Handling Psychology
modules.lesson_objective: Reframe objections as requests for more information, respond calmly not defensively, turn objections into closes

modules.title: The Top 10 Closing Objections + Responses
modules.lesson_objective: Know the 10 most common objections cold, deliver natural responses without sounding scripted

modules.title: Closing Techniques
modules.lesson_objective: Ask for the sale confidently, use proven closing techniques without pressure, handle last-minute resistance

modules.title: Contract Walk-Through & Compliance
modules.lesson_objective: Walk through contract clearly and confidently, prevent buyer's remorse before it starts, meet all legal and compliance obligations

modules.title: Cancellation Prevention & Buyer's Remorse
modules.lesson_objective: Understand why cancellations happen, prevent remorse before it sets in, lock in commitment post-close

modules.title: Advanced Closing Scripts
modules.lesson_objective: Deploy high-momentum closing language for the final decision moment without sounding pushy

modules.title: Referral Science: Self-Sustaining Pipeline
modules.lesson_objective: Turn every customer into a lead generator using a repeatable referral ask system

modules.title: Post-Sale Communication & Reviews
modules.lesson_objective: Deliver a 5-star experience after the signature — stay-in-touch system, review requests, and install prep

modules.title: Change Order Management
modules.lesson_objective: Save the deal when site conditions, equipment, or pricing change after contract — protect relationships and commissions

modules.title: The Referral System
modules.lesson_objective: Generate referrals consistently not randomly, create a repeatable referral process, build pipeline that doesn't depend on cold prospecting

modules.title: Referral System Architecture
modules.lesson_objective: Build a structured, repeatable referral engine — timing, scripting, and tracking referral conversations

modules.title: Reputation Building & Online Presence
modules.lesson_objective: Build a digital reputation that generates inbound leads, manage reviews proactively, use social proof at the door

modules.title: Review Generation & Social Proof Systems
modules.lesson_objective: Build a systematic process for generating 5-star reviews and deploying social proof in the field
modules.transcript_section: Module 6.2A – Review Generation & Social Proof Systems

modules.title: KPI Tracking & Self-Coaching
modules.lesson_objective: Track meaningful metrics not just activity, identify where the funnel is leaking, self-coach using data

modules.title: Orphan Owner Reactivation Playbook
modules.lesson_objective: Reactivate former customers and orphan leads — convert dormant relationships into new deals and referrals

modules.title: Long-Term Mindset: Career vs. Job
modules.lesson_objective: Reframe solar as a career investment, build identity as a solar professional, set long-term income goals

modules.title: KPI Mastery & Self-Coaching System
modules.lesson_objective: Build a daily self-coaching ritual using your own KPI data to identify leaks and close the gap

modules.title: Advanced Scenario Practice
modules.lesson_objective: Integrate all skills in complex real-world simulations, practice under pressure, receive detailed feedback

modules.title: Certification Exam
modules.lesson_objective: Demonstrate mastery across all 6 days of training — written and role-play certification

modules.title: Day 6 Wrap-Up & Day 7 Preview
modules.lesson_objective: Consolidate Day 6, celebrate certification, set expectations for Day 7 field day

modules.title: Pre-Field Briefing
modules.lesson_objective: Review Day 7 agenda, set expectations for shadowing, address any last-minute questions

modules.title: Appointment #1 — Shadow & Observe
modules.lesson_objective: Watch a top rep run a full appointment, take structured observation notes, debrief key decisions

modules.title: Appointment #2 — Shadow & Observe
modules.lesson_objective: Second shadow appointment — identify patterns, adapt observation to different homeowner type

modules.title: Appointment #3 — Debrief & Reset
modules.lesson_objective: Decompress and process learnings, build confidence for afternoon appointment, review notes and scripts

modules.title: Pre-Appointment Prep
modules.lesson_objective: Complete pre-appointment ritual before running solo appointment — mindset, materials, objectives

modules.title: Rep Runs Full Appointment
modules.lesson_objective: Execute a full appointment solo from door to close — apply all 6 days of training in a live setting

modules.title: Post-Appointment Debrief
modules.lesson_objective: Structured debrief of the solo appointment — what worked, what to improve, coaching notes

modules.title: Certification Sign-Off
modules.lesson_objective: Complete final program certification, receive official sign-off, transition to active rep status

modules.title: Solo Prospecting
modules.lesson_objective: Apply Day 2 prospecting skills in real territory, set 1-2 appointments for next week, build confidence through independent action

batch_1_priority_critical.description: Run first — these are the highest-impact modules for close rate and certification

batch_2_day1_foundations.description: Day 1 core + tech modules — run before launch

batch_5_day6_day7.description: Advanced skills, certification, field day — run last
